title: Shared Garden Maintenance Notice Update
intent: Update a resident-facing shared garden maintenance notice after weather and resident feedback change the safe access boundary before operator scheduling review continues.

notes: The notice update describes changed access and timing only; it does not expose resident feedback identity, unit numbers, worker identity, or media feeds.

fallback.condition: Weather, resident concern, blocked alternate path, or maintenance vendor delay makes the previous garden notice inaccurate.
fallback.action: Supersede the previous notice, pause scheduling review, publish the updated boundary, and keep a human operator contact path open.

artifacts.description: Plain-language synthetic notice update that supersedes a previous shared garden maintenance notice before operator scheduling review continues.
